'''''Dotermin''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces while resupplying the [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']] Star Destroyer with [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. This occurred during the Empire's attempt to destroy Rebel [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] production in the lead-up to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
